name: The Jones Law Firm, LLC
description_short: Columbus, Ohio bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings for individuals and families seeking debt discharge or repayment plans.
description_long:
The Jones Law Firm, LLC is a bankruptcy law practice located in Columbus, Ohio, serving the Franklin County area. The firm was established to help individuals and families navigate financial hardship through the bankruptcy process, with a stated mission of helping clients "regain control of their financial futures." The practice operates from 134 Northwoods Blvd., Suite B1 in Columbus and maintains an online presence at jonesbankruptcy.com.

The firm offers legal representation for both Chapter 7 bankruptcy (fresh start/liquidation) and Chapter 13 bankruptcy (debt consolidation/repayment plans). According to their website, they have helped hundreds of clients file bankruptcy. The firm explicitly notes it is "considered a debt relief agency by federal law" and "helps people file for bankruptcy relief under the Bankruptcy Code." Services include free consultations, personalized guidance through the bankruptcy filing process, and flexible payment plans described as "affordable pricing."

The firm distinguishes itself through attorney-specific expertise and a client-focused approach. Michael Kraig, one of the named attorneys, is described as specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcies with "deep understanding of financial distress solutions." A client testimonial from Marcy W. specifically praises the personalized approach, noting the attorney "took me through everything, explaining the pluses and minuses" and that clients don't feel like "just a number/case." The firm also provides educational resources including blog posts on bankruptcy topics and FAQs.

The firm appears to be a legitimate, localized bankruptcy practice with reasonable credentials and client-focused positioning. However, the website provides limited information about attorney qualifications, years of experience, success rates, or detailed fee structures beyond mentioning "affordable pricing and payment plans." The firm's digital presence and educational content are modest compared to larger bankruptcy practices. As with any legal representation, prospective clients would benefit from detailed consultation before engaging services.
pros: Offers free initial consultations to evaluate bankruptcy options
Provides flexible payment plans making legal services more accessible
Specializes exclusively in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcies with focused expertise
Client testimonials highlight personalized, non-transactional approach to representation
Offers educational resources including blog posts, FAQs, and Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 comparison guides
Local Columbus, Ohio presence serving Franklin County area directly
Addresses common financial distress situations (wage garnishment, foreclosure, repossession, creditor harassment)
cons: Website lacks detailed attorney background, credentials, years of experience, or bar admission information
No published fee schedule or transparent pricing information beyond vague "affordable pricing" claims
Limited information about bankruptcy success rates or client outcomes
Modest online presence and educational content compared to larger bankruptcy law firms
Only two named attorneys listed with limited detailed professional background information
best_for: Columbus and Franklin County residents facing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing
Individuals experiencing wage garnishment, foreclosure, or creditor harassment seeking legal relief
Families needing personalized bankruptcy guidance with flexible payment arrangements
Debtors with high credit card debt, medical debt, or tax debt seeking discharge or repayment plans
diagnosis: The Jones Law Firm is best for Columbus-area residents needing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy representation who value a localized, personalized approach. The main caveat is limited public information about attorney qualifications, detailed fee structures, and case outcomes—requiring direct consultation to fully evaluate fit and costs.
services: Flexible payment plan options for legal fees
